experience.description: Shipping full-stack features end to end with React.js, Node.js, Express.js, MongoDB, and Spring Boot — from secure JWT/RBAC authentication to real-time Socket.IO systems and MongoDB performance tuning.
Built a strong foundation in data structures, algorithms, databases, and software engineering principles.

projects.title: Enterprise CRM Platform Suite
projects.description: Architected multi-role CRM platforms (Client / Agent / Admin / Super Admin) for 5+ distinct business workflows, with an AI-powered assistant module, trading analytics dashboards, and device-level security controls.

projects.title: Online Food Ordering System
projects.description: Built a complete ordering ecosystem — customer, restaurant, menu, and order modules — with Spring Security authentication, Hibernate/JPA, MySQL, and a responsive React.js frontend.

projects.title: Real-Time Chat Application
projects.description: Engineered a WebSocket-based messaging platform supporting one-to-one and group chat, presence tracking, media sharing, and instant notifications for concurrent users.
